rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes only in valid scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in the model.
Avoid unsafe numeric or Boolean encodings of event ports or opaque data types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings should appear after subcomponents and connections in the implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL event ports as numeric or Boolean values without explicit data representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE expressions
